chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1717 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7383/2023 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case 21.12.2023 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with ASI Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP Sukkur and ASI/IO Sain Dino of Police Station Salehpat..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statements have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2, 3 and 4, which are taken on record. IO of the case is present and submits that he has recorded statement of alleged abductee Mst. Naseema (Petitioner No.1) U/S 161 CrPC, wherein she has stated that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Sakha Muhammad (Petitioner No.2) with her own accord and freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her father (Respondent No.5) has lodged a false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. IO further submits that he will file a copy of such statement along with his report before the Magistrate concerned for disposal of the subject FIR in accordance with law. Petitioners and their Counsel, being satisfied with the above statement of IO, do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with direction to official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law, as and when they need. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
